subcodes.first_line: O Khadíjih and O Fátimih! The entirety of creation, both male and female, hath been brought into being for the recognition of God and the remembrance of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خدیجه و یا فاطمه جمیع عالم از ذکور و اناث از برای عرفان حق و ذکر حق و
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @role and station of women, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
